CREATE TABLE web_requests (id INT, request_url VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO web_requests (id, request_url, created_at) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com/index.html', NOW());
INSERT INTO web_requests (id, request_url, created_at) VALUES (2, 'http://example.com/about', NOW());
INSERT INTO web_requests (id, request_url, created_at) VALUES (3, 'http://example.com/contact', NOW());
SELECT http_physical_path() AS physical_path FROM web_requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT http_physical_path() AS physical_path FROM web_requests WHERE request_url LIKE 'http://example.com/%';
SELECT (SELECT http_physical_path() FROM web_requests WHERE id = 2) AS physical_location, request_url FROM web_requests;
SELECT w.request_url, (SELECT http_physical_path() FROM web_requests WHERE id = w.id) AS physical_path FROM web_requests w;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM web_requests WHERE http_physical_path() LIKE '%index.html%';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM web_requests WHERE request_url IS NOT NULL) AS total_requests, (SELECT http_physical_path() FROM web_requests WHERE id = 3) AS physical_path FROM dual;
